motion_rule.author: Reviewing Attorney
motion_rule.basis: motion to modify an existing child support order, 19-A M.R.S. § 2009

motion_relief: modify the existing child support order entered in this matter
allegations:
The existing child support order was entered more than three years ago.

There has been a substantial change in the financial circumstances of the parties since the existing order was entered.

Application of the Reese T. Moe to the parties' current circumstances results in a support obligation that varies more than fifteen percent from the existing order.
document_title: Plaintiff's Motion to Modify Child Support
